developer_response.body:
Hey! 

We know your struggles, and we were disappointed too, Not to worry! On the 31st of Jan 2026, we are releasing our second version that will fix almost everything wrong with the Old Release, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I was so hyped for this game, and was extremely sad in January when it was announced that the release will be delayed for a few months. They said it was to make the quality of the game better, so I was okay with that, and I waited 2 months… for this? First of all: The player hands are the worst hands I have ever seen in any gorilla tag fan game. Second of all: The hitbox for the hands is absolutely horrible. It takes me so long to type anything because the fingers don’t even line up with the hitbox. Third: The name system is so glitched. Why am I seeing my name on other players? I was playing with my friends, and we were all seeing different names on each other. Fourth: The thing that shows the recent coordinates you typed in doesn’t even work. There’s not much to say about it, it just completely doesn’t work. Fifth: This game almost caused my headset to crash multiple times. You can’t even get very far from the ship before everything starts glitching like crazy. Sixth: Flying is horrible. It takes like 30 seconds to stop, and it’s so hard to control. And when I try to come down to the ground to land, I just hit the ground and bounce off and then get launched 20 miles from where I was trying to stop. Seventh: There isn’t even voice chat. What is a VR game without voice chat? You have no form of communication with people in this game. You get so many people excited, you delay the game for 2 months to supposedly make it better, and then you release it in a condition where it’s barely playable. It’s insane.
best game

Earth tagging, also known as earthing or grounding, is a crucial electrical safety practice used in buildings, electrical systems, and industrial facilities. It involves connecting electrical installations to the earth to prevent electrical hazards, protect equipment, and enhance overall system performance. The importance of earth tagging cannot be overstated, as it plays a key role in preventing electric shocks, reducing the risk of electrical fires, and ensuring the safe operation of electrical devices. This essay explores the benefits of earth tagging and why it is essential for safety, efficiency, and reliability.

Preventing Electric Shocks
One of the primary benefits of earth tagging is its ability to protect people from electric shocks. When an electrical fault occurs, such as a short circuit or a leakage current, the excess electricity needs a safe path to dissipate. Without proper grounding, this excess electricity can pass through a person who comes into contact with a faulty appliance, leading to severe injuries or even death. By providing a direct path for fault currents to flow into the ground, earth tagging ensures that electrical systems remain safe for users. This is particularly important in homes, workplaces, and industrial settings where multiple electrical appliances are used.

Conclusion
Earth tagging is an essential practice that enhances electrical safety, prevents fires, protects equipment, and ensures system stability. Without proper grounding, electrical systems become dangerous, increasing the risk of shocks, fires, and equipment failures. By implementing effective earth tagging measures, individuals and businesses can create a safer environment, reduce maintenance costs, and comply with safety regulations. Ultimately, earth tagging is a fundamental aspect of modern electrical installations that should never be overlooked.,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,Chatgpt thats the wrong type of earth tag, whatever though. that also works
